compositional_truth_check.p1_yellow_pot: Systemic Loss: No visible plant matter; soil appears dormant/barren.
compositional_truth_check.p2_black_pot: Systemic Loss: No visible plant matter; soil appears dormant/barren.
compositional_truth_check.p3_black_pot: Present: Pothos specimen with single leaf and white rabbit anchor.
compositional_truth_check.p4_silver_guest: Systemic Loss: No evidence of secondary plant growth in shared pots.

inventory_reconciliation.notes: Registry indicates P1, P2, and P4 should be present. Visual evidence confirms only P3 (Pothos) remains active. P1 and P2 pots contain only soil and debris.

plant_audit.p3: Active: Single leaf Pothos, showing signs of chlorosis (pale color).

biome_observations.soil_condition: Dark, moist, potentially over-saturated in P3; P1/P2 soil appears undisturbed.
biome_observations.debris: Eggshell fragments present in P3; electronic component (pin header) introduced in CURRENT image.
biome_observations.anomalies: New Introduction: Electronic pin header placed on desk surface in final frame.

temporal_deltas.earliest_to_t-1: Minimal change; P3 leaf remains stable.
temporal_deltas.t-1_to_current: Introduction of a small electronic component (pin header) to the right of the pots.

visual_health_inference.p3_pothos: Stressed. The single leaf is pale and lacks turgor pressure. The presence of eggshells suggests an attempt at nutrient supplementation, but the specimen is failing to thrive.

anomalies: Eggshell fragments in P3 soil (nutrient intervention).
Electronic pin header (non-botanical object) introduced in final frame.
vision_report.narrative_description: The biome is in a state of severe decline. Of the four registered specimens, only the Pothos (P3) remains, and it is in a weakened, chlorotic state. The yellow pot (P1) and black pot (P2) are devoid of plant life. The environment shows signs of human intervention, specifically the addition of eggshells and a small electronic component, which do not appear to have improved the health of the remaining specimen.
